how_it_works.title: Describe Your Landing Page Goal
how_it_works.description: Tell us: what you're selling, for whom, what the offer is. For example: 'English courses for adults, first lesson free.'

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Landing Page
how_it_works.description: The neural network generates the structure, copy, visuals, and call to action for maximum conversion.

how_it_works.title: Make Adjustments
how_it_works.description: Change headlines, add photos, configure forms — all in the visual editor with no code.

how_it_works.title: Connect Your Advertising
how_it_works.description: Publish the landing page and launch your ads. Analyze conversion and improve results.

faq.question: How is a landing page different from a regular website?
faq.answer: A landing page is a single-page website with one goal: to lead the customer to a specific action (purchase, inquiry, call). A regular website can contain many pages.

faq.question: What is a landing page used for?
faq.answer: Landing pages are ideal for advertising campaigns, product launches, promotions, lead generation, and service sales. They convert traffic into customers more effectively than multi-page websites.

faq.question: Can I create a landing page without skills?
faq.answer: Yes. Promto does all the work: writes copy, selects design, builds structure. You only need to describe the task.

faq.question: How quickly will the ready landing page appear?
faq.answer: Generation takes about 2 minutes. The landing page is immediately ready for publishing and ad campaigns.

faq.question: Is the builder suitable for an agency?
faq.answer: Yes. You can create landing pages for clients quickly and in large volumes. Paid plans offer more features and remove the watermark.

faq.question: Can I embed forms for collecting leads?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add inquiry forms, callback request forms, newsletter subscription forms, and other elements for collecting contacts.
